text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho and I visit the art museum. Our
mission is to learn what we can from an exhibition
featuring photos of Tiara tour Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After overhearing another visitor say that racers
on the Classic Triple Crown tour are better than
those on the Triple Tiara tour, Sweep Tosho is
outraged.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Convinced that the tour doesn't matter because
strength is strength, she struggles to accept that
the world at large feels differently.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She decides she's going to destroy these
assumptions and wake everyone up. And to help
her do that, she's going to find her racing magic
and use it to change the world.
